title: Build IPC Bridge for Claude Subprocess Management
description: Implement the Rust backend functions to spawn, monitor, and terminate claude -p subprocess agents. Use tauri-plugin-shell to manage child processes. Create an IPC protocol for the frontend to request agent spawning, receive stdout/stderr streams, and handle process lifecycle events. This is literally the nervous system connecting Rick's brain to the Morty army.
acceptance_criteria: spawn_agent Tauri command starts claude -p process with given prompt
stdout and stderr streams are captured and forwarded to frontend via events
Process PID is tracked and stored in agents table
kill_agent command terminates process and updates agent status
list_agents returns all running agent PIDs and their status
Graceful shutdown terminates all child processes on app quit
agent_output: IPC bridge implemented in claude_process.rs with full stream-json parsing, session management, and Tauri event forwarding.
